DP.490.0001:
[0103,0000]: What was that about?!\f
Oh, hey, [0103,0001]!\f
Hey! I’m going to the lake!
You come too! And be quick about it!\f
OK, [0103,0001]? I’m fining
you $1 million if you’re late!\f
DP.490.0003:
Hiya, [0103,0000].
[0103,0001] was looking for you.\f
I think he’s home now.
Why don’t you go check it out?\f
DP.490.0004:
Hiya, [0103,0000].
[0103,0001] was looking for you.\f
I think he’s home now.
Why don’t you go check it out?
DP.490.0005:
Hiya, [0103,0000].
You’re looking for [0103,0001]?\f
He just went tearing off a little
while ago.\f
He’s probably not gone too far.
Why not go chase after him?
DP.490.0006:
[0103,0000]? He went tearing off
in a huge rush a while ago.
DP.490.0007:
Everyone goes off on adventures,
and then they gradually grow up...
DP.490.0008:
It’s true that wild Pokémon do attack
people sometimes...\f
However, Pokémon also let you become
friends with them.
DP.490.0009:
Oh! A Pokémon!
You look good together!
DP.490.0010:
Oh, you’re helping put together
a Pokédex?\f
That means you’re going to travel
all over the region with Pokémon!\f
That sounds like a lot of fun!
I’m a little envious, to be honest!
DP.490.0011:
Technology just blows me away!\f
I mean, now you can play with people
around the world...wirelessly!
